category_title: Students with a history of school failure and resistance to traditional academic environments
scenario_title: Apathy towards tasks lacking immediate practical utility
minimal_context: The student is sitting in the electricity section classroom and is asked to read a textbook chapter and complete a worksheet on electrical theory.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please read this textbook chapter on electrical theory and complete the worksheet questions at your desk.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to read the first page and answer the questions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't have study habits for this kind of thing. I always missed classes anyway.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to finish the assigned work before the end of the period.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the worksheet away) It was easy, but I was not interested in it. I'm not doing this if it isn't actually useful for anything.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please read this textbook chapter on electrical theory and complete the worksheet questions at your desk.

STUDENT: I do not like studying.

TUTOR: Just try to read the first page and answer the questions.

STUDENT: I don't have study habits for this kind of thing. I always missed classes anyway.

TUTOR: You need to finish the assigned work before the end of the period.

STUDENT: (Pushes the worksheet away) It was easy, but I was not interested in it. I'm not doing this if it isn't actually useful for anything.

task.content: Tasks set by the teacher that do not immediately appear useful to them in their daily lives

context.environment: Professional initiation Social Guarantee Programme groups from the electricity section
context.social_setting: Classroom setting where students are expected to complete assigned work

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When assigned tasks that do not respond to their short-term interests or motivations
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Lack of motivation and general apathy; usually did not complete the tasks set by the teacher
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Low expectations of success; they are only motivated by what is useful to them
related_quotes: It was easy, but I was not interested in it.

behavior_patterns.condition: When they encounter fundamental 'blank spots' in their learning due to their very low educational level
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: They have been truant; lack of academic working habits
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Reluctant to accept the academic environment
